<a id="kind-javadownloadtoken"></a>
## JavaDownloadToken

Manage OCI Java download tokens.

- `Plural`: `javadownloadtokens`
- `Scope`: `Namespaced`
- `APIVersion`: `jmsjavadownloads.oracle.com/v1beta1`
- `Sample`: [Sample](../../../samples/jmsjavadownloads/v1beta1/javadownloadtoken.md) (`config/samples/jmsjavadownloads_v1beta1_javadownloadtoken.yaml`)
- `Packages`: Not currently exposed by a customer-visible package.
